text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some fan mail has arrived for Air Shakur.
However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just put them all over there. It's not like there's
anything worth reading.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: They've gotta be weirdos if they're writing to me. I bet they're not even expectin' me to read it all anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Let's hurry up and get training.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You're supposed to be a pro, so try acting
like one. Leave all your personal feelings outta
this.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: They're my fans. I'm allowed to think whatever I want about them.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And I don't care what they think about me either.
Everyone's equal, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll just hold on to them for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? I just said I don't freakin' need th—
choice_data_list: As your trainer, we're equals, right?
As your trainer, we're equals, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as we finish training, I go to put the fan
mail in a storage box. As I do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A single postcard falls to the floor, and I
accidentally catch a glimpse of the contents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"When I was having trouble at work, seeing you
run with such determination really helped me find
courage. That's why I won't ask you to do your
best."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I'm writing this letter just to let you know that
you have people like me out there cheering for
you."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, another fan letter arrives. Once
more, Air Shakur shows no interest in opening the
envelope. Still...
choice_data_list: Let's have a good session today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not have a typical relationship with her
fans, but there's unmistakably some kind of bond
at work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that makes me even more excited to
train her.
